# PERF-001 negative: regex compiled once at package scope
lang: go
file: PERF-001-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"regexp"
	"strings"
)

var headerRE = regexp.MustCompile(`^[A-Z]+$`)

func CountMatches(text string) int {
	parts := strings.Split(text, "\n")
	count := 0
	for _, line := range parts {
		if headerRE.MatchString(line) {
			count++
		}
	}
	return count
}
